api.name: PUBLIC_APP_URL
api.description: Public client app URL used for auth callbacks and CORS.

api.name: BETTER_AUTH_URL
api.description: Public Better Auth base URL exposed by the API Worker.

api.name: BETTER_AUTH_SECRET
api.description: Better Auth secret used to initialize the auth runtime.

api.name: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
api.description: Managed OpenRouter API key for hosted OpenPencil chat on approved accounts.

api.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
api.description: OpenAI API key for hosted AI proxy.

api.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
api.description: Anthropic API key for hosted AI proxy.

api.name: SCENARIO_API_KEY
api.description: Scenario API key or combined key:secret pair for hosted image generation proxy.

api.name: SCENARIO_API_SECRET
api.description: Scenario API secret when SCENARIO_API_KEY is stored separately from the secret.

api.name: RESEND_API_KEY
api.description: Resend API key for magic link / OTP email delivery.

api.name: SENTRY_DSN
api.description: Sentry DSN for Worker error monitoring.

api.name: USER_KEY_ENCRYPTION_SECRET
api.description: Encryption secret for per-user hosted provider keys stored in D1.
